title: simple herobrine mod
description: This mod just adds a few simple herobrine features to the game like herobrine tools, herobrine, herobrine block and a villager which you can get with a block of herobrine!
body:
The Simple Herobrine Mod adds Herobrine-themed content to the game, including new tools, villagers, and blocks!

Herobrine Tools: These rare tools are crafted from Herobrine gems, which are dropped by Herobrine when defeated. The tools have a durability of 250, making them last longer than standard tools.

Herobrine: Herobrine is the main focus of the mod. He deals 5 damage and doesn't spawn naturally to avoid too many of him in the world. When killed, he drops a Herobrine block, which can be used for creating a special villager called a Herobriner.

Block of Herobrine: This block can be used for spooky decoration. It’s also needed to create a Herobriner villager.

Herobriner: A special villager with Herobrine's creepy white eyes. This villager trades Herobrine tools, blocks, and spawn eggs. Zombie villagers also have Herobrine's glowing eyes, giving them a spooky look.

Herobrine Ore and gem: The mod adds Herobrine ore, which can be found from Y levels 1-100. When mined, it drops Herobrine gems, which can be crafted into armor, tools, and Herobrine blocks.

Herobrine's painting: herobrine's painting is one of a ton of paintings in minecraft and it looks like herobrine.
![herobrine's painting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/749c33dd324054d4a556b5fa0993cd4dee7fb9f3_0.webp)

The mod was inspired by videos from [@knarfy](https://www.youtube.com/@Knarfy) and [@cringygull](https://www.youtube.com/@cringygull) on youtube and offers a fun way to explore the legend of Herobrine.

enjoy experomenting with it and bye
